properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2 v7 v2 v8 v2 v9 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: I shall not be, I shall not be moved. I shall not be, I shall not be moved; Just like a tree that’s planted by the waters, I shall not be moved.

verse.name: v3
v4
v5
verse.lines: On His word I’m feeding, I shall not be moved; He’s the One that’s leading, I shall not be moved, Just like a tree that’s planted by the waters, I shall not be moved.

verse.name: v6
v7
v8
v9
